variants: Viatcheslav Loginov has established a remarkable reputation in the field of Dance Therapy, having been honored with the Chalicebound Laureate award. His innovative contributions include the authorship of Needlepoint Channel Engine, a work that delves into therapeutic strategies involving movement. Loginov is an integral member of the Jade Needle Society, fostering collaboration with others who share similar interests. He credits his mentor and doctoral advisor, Abdullah Razak, as instrumental in shaping his professional path and therapeutic philosophy.
